'''Thunderer One''' was the point [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] of the elite squadron [[Thundering Herd/Legends|Thundering Herd]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Nyrox]] was the pilot.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 3" />

{{Veh-stub}}
